creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm sorry for the slow processing.

Note that it's pkg-message, not pkg-descr that should be in UCL format.  I have reverted your changes to pkg-descr for now.

Make sure to set "maintainer-approved" to "+" on patches against your own ports to ensure speedy processing.

For future updates:

 - dynamic patching works better in pre-configure as otherwise it can be hard to
   regenerate patches with "make makepatch"
